message:
feat(engine): add 187 enrichment integration tests across 3 more modules

Eleventh batch of enrichment tests (3 new, 2 pre-existing skipped):

- native_addon_cohort_gate: 60 tests (cohort tiers, parity/security/
  throughput verdicts, governance actions, gate evaluation, receipts)
- native_addon_parity_gate: 64 tests (gate axes, finding severities,
  gate config builders, evaluator lifecycle, gate receipts, sealing)
- obligation_channel: 63 tests (obligation states, send/commit/abort
  lifecycle, backpressure, leak tracking, force abort, determinism)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
